name: IpGetAddressAsString
title: IpGetAddressAsString
syntax: long IpGetAddressAsString( dword numericAddress, char address[], dword count);
description: The function converts a numeric address in host-byte order (little endian) to an address string in dot notation as in "192.168.0.10". For IPv6 the address string has to contain a string in colon notation as in "1234:5678:9ABC:DEF1:2345:6789:ABCD:EF12"

parameters.name: numericAddress
parameters.description: The numerical IPv4 address to be converted.
